description: This Java class 'NotificationService' orchestrates notification sending for business loan application events such as submission and decisions. It handles email and SMS notifications, with support for optional officer copies. The class manages notification configurations and ensures best-effort delivery, logging failures without interrupting workflow.

classes.name: NotificationService
classes.description: A service class that manages sending notifications for business loan application events, providing email and SMS notifications with various fallback and logging mechanisms.

methods.name: onApplicationSubmitted
methods.description: Handles notification logic when an application is submitted.

methods.name: onDecisionProduced
methods.description: Handles notification logic when a decision is made for an application.

methods.name: onDecisionOverridden
methods.description: Handles notification logic when a decision is overridden by an officer.

methods.name: sendBestEffort
methods.description: Attempts to send notifications via email and SMS, handling errors gracefully and sending officer copies if configured.

methods.name: buildSubmissionBody
methods.description: Constructs notification message body for application submission.

methods.name: buildDecisionBody
methods.description: Constructs notification message body for application decision events, optionally indicating overrides.

methods.name: safe
methods.description: Safely returns a trimmed string, replacing null with an empty string.

methods.name: truncate
methods.description: Truncates a string to a maximum length, adding ellipsis if needed.
